page_content:
Formerly: EDHI788P.

EDHI667 Women in Higher Education (3 Credits)

A comprehensive overview of the history, present condition, and current research on women students, faculty, adminstrators, and staff in higher education. Explores why and how women and men experience higher educaton differently, by drawing on historical, cultural, and psychological contexts, feminist theoretical and research perspectrives and recent research in various disciplines.

Credit Only Granted for. EDHI667 or EDHI788A.
